english: Salutations to Gaurisha, salutations to the beloved of Gauri
roman: Gaurishaya namastubhyam Gauri priyaya te namah

hindi: शिवाय शंकराय च गिरिजाधवाय ते नमः॥
english: Salutations to Shiva, Shankara and the husband of Girija
roman: Shivaya Shankaraya cha Girija dhavaya te namah

english: Salutations to the one adorned with serpents, wearing the elephant skin
roman: Namaste naga bhushaya namaste gaja charma ne

english: Salutations to the bearer of the trident, salutations to the one smeared with ash
roman: Namaste trishula dhara namo bhasmavrittaya cha

english: O Gaurisha, lord of Girija, Lord of mountains attended by followers
roman: Gaurisha Girija natha Girisha nuchara Prabho

english: O lord of the world, Jagannatha, victory to Shankara the bearer of the spear
roman: Jagat pate Jagannatha jaya Shankara Shuline

english: Whoever reads this Gaurisha Ashtakam daily with reverence
roman: Gaurisha ashtakam idam yah pathet nityam adratah

english: Obtains the grace of Gauri and attains union with Shiva
roman: Gauryah prasadam prapnoti Shiva sayujyam apnuyat
